prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 16710→16885→15836→46486→32923，2024 年出现明显断档（46486），2025 年大幅回升至 32923，近两年波动剧烈；2025 年基准约 32923 名；该校在云南理科/物理类计划 2021 年 37 人、2022 年 34 人、2023 年 33 人、2024 年 51 人、2025 年 82 人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026 年计划 97 人，较 2025 年扩招约 18.3%，招生名额增加对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 125 名，近年排名稳定在 124–131 区间，属中游偏上 211；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第 105，评价为“一般”，短视频平台关注度不高，报考热度无明显异常信号；第五轮学科评估中应用经济学获评 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科；招生专业中金融学类、经济统计学、财政学、经济学类等均属应用经济学一级学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，金融/财经/经济分化观望；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数 377900 人，较 2025 年物理类 173282 人明显增加（估算物理类约 22.9 万），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，属东北地区，对云南考生存在一定地域距离；该校在云南招生占比不高，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 32923、2026 年计划扩招约 18.3%（缓解竞争）与本省物理类考生规模扩大约 32%（加剧竞争）两股相反力量，扩招幅度小于考生增幅，竞争整体略加剧；同时 2025 年位次已从 2024 年断档大幅回升，显示学校在云南吸引力恢复。预测最低位次约 36736 名，区间 36236–37236 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 16710→16885→15836→46486→32923. In 2024, there was a significant gap (46486), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 32923, with severe fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 32923. The enrollment plan for Liaoning University in Yunnan's science/physics category was 37 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 82 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 97, an increase of about 18.3% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 125th, with a stable ranking in the 124–131 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 105, with a rating of 'average,' indicating low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Among the enrollment majors, Finance, Economic Statistics, Public Finance, and Economics are all under the first-level discipline of Applied Economics, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, while Finance/Finance/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is 377,900, a significant increase from the 173,282 physics category takers in 2025 (estimated physics category about 229,000), intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region, which presents a certain geographical distance for Yunnan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is not high, and geographical preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 32923, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.3% (alleviating competition), and the expansion of the province's physics category candidate pool by about 32% (intensifying competition), the two opposing forces result in a slight overall intensification of competition. Additionally, the 2025 ranking has rebounded significantly from the 2024 gap, indicating a recovery in the university's appeal in Yunnan. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36736, with a range of 36236–37236.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 36236–37236, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 36000), you can mainly aim for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Digital Economy. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 37000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors such as Public Finance and Finance, which are related to Applied Economics, while also considering stable options like Accounting in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2771→2594→6989→3931→5057, with a significant gap in 2023 (6989), a sharp recovery to 3931 in 2024, and a decline to 5057 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 5057th place; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan was 23 students in 2021, 20 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, with continuous expansion in recent years; the 2026 plan is 40 students, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, and the increase in slots slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 125th on the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with strong influence in liberal arts comprehensive strength in Northeast China; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; its Douyin popularity ranking is 105, rated as 'average', with no abnormal attention in applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; among liberal arts enrollment majors, the Economics category belongs to the first-level discipline of Applied Economics, which attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Law are socially popular and recommended, while Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is 377,900, a significant increase from 112,406 history category candidates in 2025 (estimated history category about 149,000), with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in Northeast China, which has a certain geographical distance for Yunnan candidates; the university's proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Yunnan is not high, and regional preference has a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5057, the 2026 plan's slight expansion of about 5.3% (easing competition), and the increase in history category candidates in this province by about 32% (intensifying competition), the growth in candidates far exceeds the expansion rate, significantly intensifying competition; at the same time, the 2025 ranking has declined compared to 2024, indicating a cooling of application popularity. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5297, with a range of 4797–5797.
